acceptance_criteria: Page emits valid schema.org JSON-LD that passes Google Rich Results.

Title length is 50–60 chars; description 140–160 chars.

business_requirements.title: Prakash Tiwari — Artist
business_requirements.description: Hero page for the Prakash Tiwari portrait studio. Functions as the artist's primary search-landing surface.
